name: NumericInput
description: A specialized input component for numeric values with formatting support using react-number-format library.
usage_guidelines: Use for numeric inputs requiring formatting (currency, percentages, etc.).
Supports thousands separators, decimal precision, and custom formats.
Use inputPrefix/inputSuffix for currency symbols or units.
Handle onValueChange for formatted and raw values.

onValueChange.description: Callback with formatted and raw numeric values.

styling_info.visual_description: Standard input field with automatic number formatting. Maintains cursor position during formatting.

Dont: Don't use for simple text inputs
Don't forget to extract raw values

Basic.title: Basic

WithForm.title: With Form
